idea-plugin.name: Theme F1rst
idea-plugin.description:
Collection of 7 vibrant and high-quality themes for IntelliJ IDEA and PyCharm. Support for multiple languages and styled for modern development (thema, tema, theme, f1rst, language, multi, bitcoin, crypto, web3, solidity, ubatuba, beach, ghibli).
  • Theme F1rst: Updated professional base with blue and grey tones. Inspired by F1rst digital identity.
  • Ubatuba Lamberto Beach: Inspired by a soft sunset in Ilhabela, with smooth ocean blues and mountain greens. A Ghibli-style aesthetic.
  • Bitcoin Tech: Tech-focused theme with Bitcoin orange and smooth dark grey. Ideal for Web3/Solidity.
  • Vaporwave Red Neon: Dark base with neon magenta and cyan.
  • Sky Garden: Studio Ghibli inspired soft look.
  • Cowboy Terminal Black: Retro green-on-black terminal.
  • Red Neon Future: High contrast futuristic corporate style.

Designed for comfort and productivity.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• 0.9.0: Melhorias no realce de sintaxe e cores de fundo do editor para todos os temas.
  • 0.8.0: New vibrant Red & Black "Theme F1rst". Fixed icon and cleaned project structure. Removed non-functional action placeholders.
  • 0.7.2: Fix Marketplace validation: removed "IDEA" from plugin name, added idea-version, and fixed description format.
  • 0.7.1: Melhorias de compatibilidade e otimização final para o Marketplace.
  • 0.7.0: Updated "IDEA Theme F1rst" with professional blue and grey tones. New modern plugin icon for Marketplace.
  • 0.6.0: Final release of theme-only version. Optimized for marketplace.
  • 0.5.0: Added "Ubatuba Lamberto Beach" theme. Inspired by Ilhabela sunsets and Ghibli style.
  • 0.4.0: Added "Bitcoin Tech" theme for Web3/Solidity developers. Updated search tags.
  • 0.3.2: Added official plugin icon and search tags (thema, tema, theme, f1rst, language, multi).
  • 0.3.1: Initial release on Marketplace. Anonymized author metadata. Added high-quality descriptions.
